{{Infobox character
| name = Bai Rou
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Truegold, Lowgold
| abilities = forge Amberwell madra, yellow madra, Ruler technique
| affiliations = Skysworn
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Bai Rou Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Bai Rou is a member of the [[Skysworn]], serving alongside his partner [[Renfei]]. He is a physically imposing man with a massive, broad build that makes him appear as solid as a wall. He typically wears green armor and a wide-brimmed hat woven from dried stalks or reeds, which keeps his face in shadow except for his bright yellow eyes. These glowing eyes serve as his [[Goldsign]]. In combat, he utilizes golden liquid [[madra]] and has been shown using a [[Ruler technique]] known as the [[Path of the Amber Well]], which allows him to manipulate water in an oppressive manner. Known for his deep voice and intimidating presence, he is capable of acting as a guard or clearing paths through crowds. He has demonstrated both intense loyalty, such as saluting his [[Captain]] and following orders, and moments of significant anger or menace.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|As a member of the [[Skysworn]], Bai Rou serves as [[Renfei]]'s partner and possesses the ability to forge [[Amberwell madra]]. This massive [[Truegold]] is characterized by his bright yellow eyes and the green armor he wears alongside a hat woven from dried stalks. During his time with [[Renfei]] and [[Eithan]] Arelius, he utilizes manacles containing [[halfsilver]] to aid his efforts. Upon seeing an [[emerald]] [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]], Bai Rou responded by letting out a roar.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bai Rou]] is [[Renfei]]'s partner in the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bai Rou]]'s [[Goldsign]] is bright yellow eyes.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bai Rou]] wears a hat woven from dried stalks.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bai Rou]] is present with [[Renfei]] and [[Eithan]] Arelius.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bai Rou]] wears green armor and has glowing yellow eyes.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bai Rou]] is a [[Skysworn]] who can forge [[Amberwell madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bai Rou]] has yellow eyes.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bai Rou]] is massive and wears a woven straw hat.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bai Rou]] is a [[Skysworn]] with yellow eyes.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bai Rou]] is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bai Rou]] uses manacles containing [[halfsilver]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bai Rou]] is a member of the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bai Rou]] has an [[emerald]] [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Bai Rou]] let out a roar when he saw her.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|While [[Yerin]] was searching for him, Bai Rou marched her into a hallway. A [[Lowgold]] wearing heavy armor and possessing a thin, white replacement arm, he was at a more advanced stage than [[Yerin]]. During their fight, he utilized a [[Ruler technique]] to command water and channeled yellow madra that swirled around his gauntlet. His glowing yellow eyes peered from beneath his hat as he unleashed [[madra]] capable of eating through both flesh and the mind. Ultimately, Bai Rou was an individual who held the power to decide the [[fate]] of [[Lindon]]'s apprentices and was suspected of having abandoned or attacked [[Yerin]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Bai Rou]] marched [[Yerin]] into the hallway.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Bai Rou]] can use yellow madra.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Bai Rou]] used yellow madra swirling around his gauntlet.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Bai Rou]]'s eyes glowed yellow from within the shade of his hat.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Bai Rou]]'s [[madra]] can eat through the mind and flesh.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Bai Rou]] is a stage more advanced than [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Bai Rou]] uses a [[Ruler technique]] to command water.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Bai Rou]] is a [[Lowgold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Bai Rou]] has a thin, white replacement arm.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Bai Rou]] is an individual who could decide whether or not to keep [[Lindon]]'s apprentices.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Bai Rou]] wears heavy armor.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Bai Rou]] is a person [[Yerin]] was looking for.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] fought [[Bai Rou]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Bai Rou]] is a person who may have attacked or abandoned [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Bai Rou]] was kidnapped and assaulted.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Bai Rou]] says the group is a calamity waiting to happen.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Bai Rou]] is a person [[Naru Gwei]] is involved with.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Bai Rou]] was seen against the railing wearing a wide straw hat.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“Bai Rou,” Naru Gwei said at last, “says that you all are a calamity waiting to happen.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
